name: Garlicky Tortillini
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Vinegar, herb or white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vinegar, mustard, oregano, rosemary, thyme, and garlic in a glass or stainless steel bowl.
2. Slowly whisk in oil until blended.
3. Cook tortellinis in boiling water, then drain.
4. Transfer tortellinis to a large bowl.
5. Gently toss with half of the vinaigrette.
6. Refrigerate covered for at least 12 hours, tossing occasionally.
7. Clean mushrooms and discard stems.
8. Toss mushroom caps with remaining vinaigrette.
9. Refrigerate for at least 12 hours, tossing occasionally.
10. Slice peppers into strips, then cut into diamonds or fancy shapes using a canape cutter.
11. Drain tortellinis and mushrooms.
12. Thread one tortellini, one pepper diamond, and one mushroom cap onto each skewer.
13. To serve, trim the bottom of the acorn squash until it stands flat.
14. Insert the skewers into the acorn squash.
